acceptance_criteria.text: Document runner reads extracted Datahub-lite source text for document agents.
proof: src/services/agent_blueprint_workspace.py passes extracted uploaded/internal source items into analyze_document_sources_with_llm.
src/services/agent_document_llm.py builds prompt context from raw.text first, then source summaries.

acceptance_criteria.text: Document analysis uses an LLM path to produce summary, risks, facts, fields, next questions, and rules applied.
proof: Production smoke returned analysis_source=gigachat and llm_analysis_used=true.

acceptance_criteria.text: Agent setup rules and recent feedback are included in the LLM prompt.
proof: Prompt includes workflow_description, extraction_rules, processing_rules, output_format, manual_control, feedback_notes, and sources.
Unit test asserts rules and source name are present in the prompt.

acceptance_criteria.text: Provider failure falls back to deterministic analysis instead of breaking the run.
Output artifact records provenance, analysis source, LLM usage flag, prompt version, and no external dispatch.
proof: Server smoke checks provenance, analysis_source, llm_analysis_used, external_dispatch_performed=false, dispatch_state=not_dispatched.

acceptance_criteria.text: Existing approval/final-result flow and feedback version loop still work.
proof: Server smoke approved final_output and created feedback version 3 from initial version 1.

acceptance_criteria.text: Backend guardrails, targeted unit tests, deploy, and server smoke pass.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose exec -T app env SMOKE_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000 python /app/scripts/smoke_agent_blueprint_document_api.py
known_gaps: Local smoke requires DATABASE_URL and is intentionally verified in the server Docker/Postgres runtime.
LLM output quality still depends on provider behavior; deterministic fallback preserves availability.
